schemas.name: error
schemas.description: Standard JSON failure envelope emitted by command failures.

schemas.name: schema.list
schemas.description: Lists available JSON schema contracts.

schemas.name: schema.show
schemas.description: Returns one named JSON schema contract.

schemas.name: schema.coverage
schemas.description: Reports schema coverage across declared JSON commands, the live catalog, generated artifacts, and SDK contract surfaces.

schemas.name: list
schemas.description: Indexed task list.

schemas.name: find
schemas.description: Task search results with matched and unmatched terms.

schemas.name: find.compact
schemas.description: Compact task search results for agent orientation without embedded plans or long specs.

schemas.name: audit
schemas.description: Validation issues for task metadata and graph references.

schemas.name: last
schemas.description: Most recent successful mutation summary.

schemas.name: history
schemas.description: Generated mutation history entries, newest first, with task and limit filters.

schemas.name: handoff
schemas.description: Agent handoff recap with recent mutations, graph health, optional task state, and suggested next commands.

schemas.name: init.ci
schemas.description: Installs or previews a repo-local Jumpspace-managed GitHub Actions PR assistant workflow.

schemas.name: doctor
schemas.description: Post-mutation diagnostics that separate blocking errors, factual warnings, and suggested repairs.

schemas.name: release.doctor
schemas.description: Package release-readiness diagnostics with local blockers separated from external npm registry state.

schemas.name: release.install-doctor
schemas.description: Active install freshness diagnostics for the invoked and PATH-resolved Jumpspace binaries.

schemas.name: context
schemas.description: Agent-ready task context packet.

schemas.name: related
schemas.description: Full dependency and reference relationships for a task.

schemas.name: related.compact
schemas.description: Compact dependency and reference relationships for agent orientation without embedded plans or long specs.

schemas.name: plan.review
schemas.description: Human approval and execution-readiness packet for a documented task.

schemas.name: plan.save
schemas.description: Successful durable plan persistence result.

schemas.name: plan.show
schemas.description: Persisted durable plan for a task.

schemas.name: plan.validate
schemas.description: Durable plan validation result with issues and structured errors.

schemas.name: ready
schemas.description: Approved or partial tasks ready for agent execution.

schemas.name: execute
schemas.description: Execution gate packet for an approved or partial task.

schemas.name: next
schemas.description: Pending unblocked durable plan steps for a task.

schemas.name: step.complete
schemas.description: Successful durable plan step completion result.

schemas.name: status
schemas.description: Successful task status update result. Verified status is excluded and must be earned with verify.

schemas.name: verify
schemas.description: Successful earned verification result with commit, checks, criteria coverage, and evidence.

schemas.name: work
schemas.description: Complete agent start packet for a ready task, including plan state, next steps, verification, schemas, guardrails, and optional drift.

schemas.name: ask
schemas.description: Evidence summary for a repo-local question. This is retrieval evidence, not an authoritative answer.

schemas.name: ask.compact
schemas.description: Compact evidence summary for agent orientation. This is retrieval evidence, not an authoritative answer.

schemas.name: semantic.build
schemas.description: Builds and enables the optional local semantic task index.

schemas.name: semantic.status
schemas.description: Reports semantic index readiness, staleness, backend, and non-blocking issues.

schemas.name: semantic.search
schemas.description: Searches the generated local semantic task index.

schemas.name: semantic.eval
schemas.description: Compares lexical, deterministic task-vector, and active semantic retrieval on built-in evaluation fixtures.

schemas.name: query
schemas.description: Deterministic graph query results with applied filters, matched graph paths, and unanswered constraints.

schemas.name: drift
schemas.description: Factual task-memory drift separated from heuristic maintenance warnings.

schemas.name: ci
schemas.description: Local CI/PR report with scan, audit, doctor, drift, repair suggestions, graph query packets, task-block suggestions, and a Markdown PR comment.

schemas.name: pr.comment
schemas.description: Idempotent, review-only PR assistant comment packet built from the local CI report.

schemas.name: repair
schemas.description: Dry-run or applied task-memory repairs for Git path drift. Renames are mechanical fixes; missing/deleted linked files become explicit gaps.

schemas.name: link
schemas.description: Dry-run or applied task metadata link updates for code, tests, dependencies, refs, and gaps.

schemas.name: link.suggest
schemas.description: Evidence-backed code/test link suggestions from working-tree changes, changed files, or explicit candidate paths. This command never mutates source.

schemas.name: link.eval
schemas.description: Built-in or file-based ranking quality evaluation for link suggestion fixtures.

schemas.name: bootstrap.context
schemas.description: Markdown heading context packet for AI-assisted graph bootstrap proposals.

schemas.name: bootstrap.discover
schemas.description: Discovers common Markdown docs, recommended config globs, profile hints, and ignored noisy paths.

schemas.name: bootstrap.propose
schemas.description: Deterministic bootstrap proposal draft packet. This is extraction evidence, not agent reasoning, and apply still requires human approval.

schemas.name: bootstrap.validate
schemas.description: Bootstrap proposal validation result.

schemas.name: bootstrap.apply
schemas.description: Bootstrap apply or dry-run result.
